title: Flow Cytometry Protocol for Human and Mouse CTLA-4 Detection
author: abinScience cheng

steps.title: Isolate PBMCs from whole blood by...
steps.instruction: Isolate PBMCs from whole blood by density gradient centrifugation (Ficoll-Paque, 400 × g, 30 min).

steps.title: For activated T cells
steps.instruction: For activated T cells: stimulate PBMCs with anti-CD3/CD28 beads or plate-bound anti-CD3 (1 μg/mL) + soluble anti-CD28 (2 μg/mL) for 48–72 hours at 37°C, 5% CO₂.

steps.title: For Treg analysis (intracellular CTLA-4 only)
steps.instruction: For Treg analysis (intracellular CTLA-4 only): activation is not required — freshly isolated PBMCs can be used directly.

steps.title: Harvest cells, wash once with PBS,...
steps.instruction: Harvest cells, wash once with PBS, centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend in FACS buffer (PBS + 2% FBS + 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in FACS buffer (PBS + 2% FBS + 0.05% sodium azide) at 1 × 10⁷ cells/mL.

steps.title: Aliquot 100 μL (1 × 10⁶...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 100 μL (1 × 10⁶ cells) per well into a 96-well V-bottom plate. For mouse samples: harvest splenocytes or lymph node cells, prepare single-cell suspension through a 70 μm cell strainer. For activated mouse T cells, stimulate with anti-CD3ε (clone 145-2C11, 1 μg/mL) + anti-CD28 (clone 37.51, 2 μg/mL) for 48 hours. Important: CTLA-4 surface expression peaks at 48–72 hours post-activation and is rapidly internalized. Timing of staining is critical.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes, discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes, discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 μL PBS containing...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 μL PBS containing fixable viability dye per manufacturer's instructions.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes, protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash once with FACS buffer. Note
steps.instruction: Wash once with FACS buffer. Note: Use a FIXABLE viability dye (not PI or 7-AAD) since downstream intracellular staining requires fixation, which eliminates live/dead discrimination by membrane-impermeable dyes.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS buffer containing human Fc block (5 μL per test).

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Do NOT wash
steps.instruction: Do NOT wash. Proceed directly to surface staining. Mouse samples:

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS buffer containing anti-mouse CD16/CD32 Fc block. - abinScience InVivoMAb Mouse Anti-Mouse CD16/CD32 (Iv0016) (Cat# MP551010): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/4094.html

steps.title: Incubate at 4°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add fluorochrome-conjugated anti-CTLA-4 antibody at recommended concentration per datasheet
steps.instruction: Add fluorochrome-conjugated anti-CTLA-4 antibody at recommended concentration per datasheet.

steps.title: Co-stain with lineage markers
steps.instruction: Co-stain with lineage markers: anti-CD3 (T cells), anti-CD4, anti-CD25 (for Treg identification).

steps.title: Incubate at 4°C for 30 minutes, protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4°C for 30 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash twice with 200 μL FACS...
steps.instruction: Wash twice with 200 μL FACS buffer, centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes. If surface-only detection is sufficient, proceed to Step 7 (Acquisition). For total CTLA-4 (surface + intracellular), continue to Step 5.

steps.title: This step is REQUIRED for detecting...
steps.instruction: This step is REQUIRED for detecting total CTLA-4, including the intracellular pool stored in vesicles. This is the recommended approach for Treg characterization (CD4+ CD25+ FoxP3+ CTLA-4+).

steps.title: After surface staining (or directly after...
steps.instruction: After surface staining (or directly after Fc block if skipping surface staining), fix cells in 200 μL fixation buffer (2–4% paraformaldehyde in PBS) at 4°C for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Wash once with FACS buffer, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Wash once with FACS buffer, centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend in 200 μL permeabilization buffer (0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 200 μL permeabilization buffer (0.1% saponin in FACS buffer, or commercial perm buffer).

steps.title: Centrifuge and resuspend in 100 μL permeabilization buffer
steps.instruction: Centrifuge and resuspend in 100 μL permeabilization buffer. Note: For combined FoxP3 + CTLA-4 staining in Tregs, use a dedicated FoxP3/Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set — the nuclear permeabilization step is also sufficient for CTLA-4 detection. Important: PE and APC conjugates retain brightness after fixation/permeabilization. FITC is also compatible. PerCP may show reduced signal after some fixation protocols — test with your specific buffer set.

steps.title: Add fluorochrome-conjugated anti-CTLA-4 antibody in permeabilization buffer at recommended concentration
steps.instruction: Add fluorochrome-conjugated anti-CTLA-4 antibody in permeabilization buffer at recommended concentration. For intracellular staining, use a DIFFERENT fluorochrome from the one used for surface CTLA-4 (if performing combined surface + intracellular protocol to distinguish the two pools). Recommended antibodies — same clones as Step 4, choose a different conjugate: - Anti-Human CD152/CTLA4 (11.2.1), PE (Cat# HB651227): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/7944.html - Anti-Human CD152/CTLA4 (11.2.1), APC (Cat# HB651237): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/5930.html - Anti-Mouse CD152/CTLA4 (9D9), PE (Cat# MB651227): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/7948.html - Anti-Mouse CD152/CTLA4 (9D9), APC (Cat# MB651237): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/5934.html Unconjugated options (requires fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody): - Anti-Human CD152/CTLA4 (11.2.1) (Cat# HB651207): https://www.abinscience.com/product/40/3655.html - Research Grade Ipilimumab (Cat# HB651016): https://www.abinscience.com/product/71/1369.html

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes in the dark
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes in the dark.

steps.title: Wash twice with permeabilization buffer (NOT...
steps.instruction: Wash twice with permeabilization buffer (NOT regular FACS buffer — saponin-based permeabilization is reversible).

steps.title: Resuspend in 200 μL FACS buffer for acquisition
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 200 μL FACS buffer for acquisition.

steps.title: Acquire ≥10,000 events in the CD3+...
steps.instruction: Acquire ≥10,000 events in the CD3+ T cell gate (or ≥50,000 total events for rare Treg populations).

steps.title: Gating strategy
steps.instruction: Gating strategy: - FSC/SSC → singlets (FSC-A vs FSC-H) → viable cells → CD3+ → CD4+ or CD8+ - For Tregs: CD3+ → CD4+ → CD25 high → FoxP3+ → CTLA-4+ - For activated T cells (surface CTLA-4): CD3+ → CD4+ → CTLA-4+

steps.title: Controls
steps.instruction: Controls: - Isotype control or FMO (fluorescence minus one) control to define CTLA-4 positive gate - Unstimulated T cells as biological negative control for surface CTLA-4 - Stimulated T cells as positive control for surface expression

steps.title: Expected results
steps.instruction: Expected results: - Surface CTLA-4: <5% on resting T cells; 20–60% on CD4+ T cells after 48–72 h anti-CD3/CD28 stimulation - Intracellular CTLA-

steps.title: 80–95% of CD4+ CD25high FoxP3+ Tregs;...
steps.instruction: 80–95% of CD4+ CD25high FoxP3+ Tregs; 10–30% of resting conventional CD4+ T cells - Mouse: similar pattern; 9D9 clone detects both surface and intracellular CTLA-4

steps.title: For in vivo CTLA-4 blocking studies, abinScience also offers
steps.instruction: For in vivo CTLA-4 blocking studies, abinScience also offers: - InVivo Plus Anti-Mouse CD152/CTLA4 (9D9) (Cat# MB651209): https://www.abinscience.com/product/68/28328.html
